spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Calm UI. No walls of data.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for Dashboard (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align for numbers, tables, and dense data. Center only for empty states or hero headers.

cards.style: Flat, solid background, 1px border (border-[#E5E4E0]), rounded-2xl. No heavy drop shadows.
cards.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-md) for interactive cards.

inputs_and_forms.style: Shadcn defaults customized with rounded-lg, border-[#E5E4E0], focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1E3F33].

tables.style: Clean, row borders only (border-b), ample cell padding (py-3 px-4). Status pills for 'Pago/Pendente'.

navigation.sidebar: Left sidebar on desktop, bottom tab bar on mobile. Active states indicated by #1E3F33 text and background tint.

motion_and_interaction.modals: Fade in with scale (opacity-0 scale-95 to opacity-100 scale-100).

login_hero.description: Friends dining and sharing together, used for the login/registration split-screen layout to convey shared expenses and trust.

texture_background.description: Abstract sand texture used sparingly with low opacity (e.g., 5%) as a background layer for onboarding screens to add tactile warmth.

specific_instructions_for_agent: Dashboard must lead with a Single-Metric Focus (e.g., 'Saldo Atual') in the top-left quadrant before showing the 50/20/10/10/10 breakdown or charts.
Implement the 50/20/10/10/10 budget rule using visual progress bars with the chart_palette colors.
For shared groups (Casa, Viagem), use the secondary color (#D96C5B) or a distinct palette color to differentiate from personal finances.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes formatted in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Never use transparent backgrounds over images without a backdrop-blur and a tinted overlay.
Avoid glassmorphism. Financial apps require solid, trustworthy surfaces.
Use Shadcn UI for all complex interactive elements (Select, Dialog, Tabs, Calendar) and recharts for visualizations.
Follow 'Mobile First' strictly. Ensure tables can scroll horizontally on mobile.
CRITICAL: Generate `.js` and `.jsx` files only. Do not use `.tsx` or TypeScript.
CRITICAL: Always explicitely set hover text colors when setting hover background colors to maintain accessibility.
Do not use walls of data; heavily employ progressive disclosure.
